description.from: Drops 5 lightning bolts upon a random enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and inflicting Electrify. Electrified enemy is stunned for 3 sec.
description.to: Deals 148*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+93.4% ATK Magic DMG to a random enemy 5 times and inflicts Electrocute. Enemies afflicted with Electrocute are stunned for 2sec.

description.from: HP of all allies is healed by ??? for 5 sec. For the duration of SKill, Kaulah gains immunity to CC and takes 50% reducesd All DMG.
description.to: For 6 sec, restores HP by 552*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+89.6% ATK every 6sec. The caster cannot perform other actions while the skill is active, but all allies take 60% reduced Magic DMG.

description.from: For 15 sec, increases all allies' ATK by ???, ATK Spd by 350, and Crit Chance by 350.
description.to: For 7sec, increases the ATK of all allies by 206*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), Attack Speed by 42%, and Critical Rate by 150.

description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG to 4 enemies every 15 sec, inflicting them with Electric shock for 20 sec, and inflicting stun for 1 sec upon a Critical Hit. Enemies inflicted with Electric Shock take a total of ??? M.DMG over 20 sec. For every enemy under Electric, Kaulah takes 15% reduced DMG. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.
description.to:
Every 15sec, deals 174*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+109.2% ATK Magic DMG to 4 enemy, inflicts Electrocute for 20sec, and stuns the target for 0.6sec on a Critical Hit.
Damage taken is reduced by 15% per enemy afflicted with Electrocute, stacking up to 3 times.

Electrocute: Deals DoT equal to 25% ATK every 1sec for 20sec.

dark.from: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.
dark.to: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec.

light.from: Allies take 25% less DMG while skill is in effect.
light.to: You are immune to status ailments while casting.

dark.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, additionally heal allies by 5% of their Max HP.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and each heal additionally restores 5% of the target's Max HP.

light.from: Recovers 1 orb of Mana for all allies.

description.from: [Swift Wind] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG {0}% boost effect is added.
description.to: [Swift Wind] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, and additionally increases Crit DMG by {0}%.

dark.from: When taking DMG, decreases ATK Spd of the attacking enemy by 300 for 5 sec and its Mana by 200 every sec. This effect is activated only once every 5 sec.
dark.to: When hit, reduces the attacker's Attack Speed by 200% and their Mana by 100 per sec for 5 sec. This effect can only trigger once every 5 sec.

description.from: Normal attacks have a {0}% chance to deal M.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK and inflicts against 2 random enemies and reduce their ATK by {2}%. If the target is already inflicted with Electric Shock, stuns the target for 2 sec.
description.to: On Normal Attack, has a 30% chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to 2 random enemies and reduce their Attack by {1}% for 10 sec. If they are shocked, they are stunned for 0.5 sec.

description.from: Summons the soul of The Bluewind, Coventina, recovering Mana of all allies by 2000. Afterward, reduces Heal Rate of all enemies by 30%, increase M.DMG the enemies take by 30% for 10 sec, and attacks a random enemy with lightning every 3 sec, dispelling positive effects, dealing ??? M.DMG, and reducing the enemy's Mana by 500. After 10 sec, deals ??? M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 5 sec.
description.to: Summons the soul of Blue Wind, Coventina, recovering {1} Mana for all allies, reducing Heal Rate of all enemies by 30% for 10sec, and every 3sec, strikes a random enemy with lightning, dealing 200% of ATK M.DMG. After 10sec, deals 400% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and dispels positive effects.

1.from: Changes Heal Rate Reduction effect to 50% and M.DMG Boost effect to 50%.

2.from: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 500 for the duration of Skill.
2.to: Increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {1} for the duration of Skill.
